arts.sum: Wilkinson, the second name on the list, brought great success to Leeds around the turn of the 1990s, winning promotion via the Second Division title in 1989-90 before his rapid rise with the club continued into the iconic 1991-92 campaign. Leeds United has been shaped by legendary managers who have left an indelible mark on the club’s identity and success.

arts.ttl: Premier League confirm major summer transfer window change that may impact Leeds United
arts.sum: "Swansea are normally a good possession side who presses high, pretty open game against them," said manager Daniel Farke . The market will swing open for business on June 1 for a special transfer period to assist clubs participating in the FIFA World Club Cup in the US.

arts.ttl: Leeds v Swansea: Farke hints at Aaronson over Gnonto
arts.sum: Leeds team news pre-Swansea City: Gnonto 50/50, Ampadu back in training The big issue was with Willy Gnonto’s ankle injury, missing out on the second half of Italy U21 duty, returning to Thorp Arch for further assessment, which has brought good news in the form of only a minor issue, with the Italian in with a 50-50 chance of featuring on Saturday.
